title: Custom Weaponery
body:
### Theres More than 15 Weapons!

**they might be inspired of other games**, like **ultrakill** and **project smash** and also some **anime**
but mostily in my head, while working in offline

> ### Heres some Exambles
> Heres one of the weapon's abilitys that are inspired on project smash
> <details>
> <summary>Spoiler</summary>
> 
> ![gambler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64208d6092477ae3a7ba1210f8945f891a3e4cc1_0.webp)
> 
> </details>
>
> And heres one of the items inspired by- uh, achuly it isnt inspired by anything, its just in my head
> <details>
> <summary>Spoiler</summary>
> 
> ![orbitstrike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7155bef62b7d740f6c6d0ca577ce492491c157_0.webp)
> 
> </details>


> # WEAPONS
> <details>
> <summary>List of Items</summary>
>   
> ## Coin
  > - Just a regular coin
  > - Right click to throw it, but doesnt deal damage
  > - Maybe you can **shoot it with something**?
> ## Dash Cut
  > - Right click to do a stunining dash!
  > - Deals damage when you aligned it at an enemy
> ## Death Cut
  > - Right click to do a strong dash
  > - Deals alot of damage when you aligned it at an enemy
> ## Domain
  > - Right click to select **3 domain expansions**
  > - Each domain does something different
  > - Only works with players and not mobs
  > - So grab your friend and torture him :)
> ## Gambler's Cane
  > - Right click to throw a dice
  > - When the dice hits any player it will make you roll a dice with 5 random colors and a random value thru 1-6 (like a dice)
  > - The colors are **[ White, Green, Yellow, Blue, Red ]**
  > - **Green** is a jackpot (gives all listed colors, **EXECPT WHITE**)
  > - **Red** is an extender changes all abilitys and also resets the cooldown
  > - The other colors you will have to find out what they will do
  > - But try obtaining **White** 3 times, **something will happend** :)
  > 
  > - Shift right click to summon a slot machine crashing the ground
  > - Deals a proper damage but not too overpowered
  > - **Notice:** theres a small bug you can use before i patch it up, throw a dice under you so it will activate the dice roll function without having any player suffer
> ## Gernade
  > - Right click to throw a gernade
  > - Explodes on a timer
  > - its not overpowered till you hit it with something
> ## GroundStrike
  > - Right click to summon a GIANT SPIKE
  > - You can see if the Giant Spike is aligned on an enemy or not
  > - The small spikes deals a little damage
  > - Jump and right click to summon a Giant Spike under you, it will launch you up and not deal damage to you
  > - Make sure you have a water bucket :)
  > - **Notice:** This weapon is somewhat broken when doing it on not a flat surface, but still broken due to unable to launch the enemys
> ## Incernation
  > - Right click to place a domain circle
  > - Being inside the circle gives you strength and resistance
  > - Works only on you the activator
> ## Orbitual Strike
  > - Right click to summon a MASSIVE ORBIT
  > - On impact, it impacts a massive explosion!
  > - When used ON an enemy, they will get slowness and be unable to jump
  > - But they still can use enderpearls
> ## Orb Throw
  > - Right click to throw a Compacted Orb
  > - On impact it does a massive explosion
  > - When thrown exactly on top of you
  > - It Shatters into pieces
> ## Peddle
  > - a regular peddle
  > - altho its hard, it can be used to do something
  > - Right click to throw a hard peddle
  > - Try hitting a gernade thats in mid-air :)
> ## Orb Phase
  > - Right click to turn into an Orb
  > - As an Orb you can run fast, jump high, and infect wither to nearby entitys
> ## Preslice Katana
  > - Right click to set a Pre-Sliced spot and angle
  > - Hold shift to see where Pre-Sliced is placed and angled
  > - Use one of three activations
  > - **PreSlice Activation:** Activates 1 Pre-Sliced per use
  > - **PreSlice Activation [Death Wish Single]:** Activates 1 Pre-Sliced per use, as a Death Wish, Deals a Massive damage
  > - **PreSlice Activation [Death Wish]:** Activates ALL Pre-Sliced as a Death Wish, Deals a Massive damage
> ## Revolver
  > - Right click to shoot
  > - If theres no ammo, just right click to load each bullet
  > - Shift right click to shoot a **Pre-Shot**
  > - If you shoot a **Pre-Shot on an entity**, **it will lock on it ONCE** Each Pre-Shot, You cannot merge multiable Pre-Shot into 1 entity
  > - If any Pre-Shot is nearby, whenever you shoot (Right click)
  > - It will instantly aims at a **Pre-Shot** before shooting
  > - **Try shooting a coin in both variants**, it may do something :)
> ## Orbitual UpperCut
  > - Right click to uppercut an enemey
  > - You can launch your self far up and go smashing on the ground
  > - By landing on the ground when launched up, it will launch other enemeys
  > - **Notice:** This weapon is still in progress in fixing, there is alot of issues so it only just does the groundslam instead of launching by looking slighty down
>
> 
> </details>





> # DISCLAIMER
>

> - Made this mod just to send something in modrinth
> - No models and textures are stolen, All made by me
